project_metadata.description: A highly professional, single landing page web app for a solo dental doctor, featuring hero, about, services, testimonials, before/after results, easy appointment form modal, contact info, and clean glassmorphic design for trust-building and conversion. Full static, frontend-only site.
project_metadata.core_purpose: Promote dental practice, inform patients, drive appointment leads.
project_metadata.target_audience: Potential and existing dental patients, local community
key_features: Hero section with name, specialty, tagline
About panel with bio and photo

pages.purpose: Clinic promotion, info, appointment lead gen.
pages.description: Single scrollable landing page for a dental doctor. Layout: vertical flow, all sections stack on top of each other. Top anchor nav. Hero at top, about, services, testimonials, gallery, appointment CTA, contact, footer. Max content width 1280px, auto margin-x. Space between sections: 64px. Glassmorphism effects for panels. Responsive for mobile/tablet/desktop. Hero spans full width; other sections contained. Appointment button opens modal form (no server integration).
pages.content_notes: ALL content is consolidated onto one responsive, SEO-optimized landing page. All sections arranged vertically; in-page jumping via anchor links. Appointment form appears as modal. No backend—form simulates appointment submission with frontend confirmation only. Testimonials, gallery, contact, and footer are static/fake content. All sections styled for healthcare/clinical trust and clarity. Highly optimized for minimal nav friction and conversion.

components.description: Top sticky horizontal bar. Flex-row layout, bg-white, shadow-md, z-30. Left: simple tooth logo (svg), next to doctor's name (medium Inter). Right: horizontally aligned nav links with pill under effect on hover. Padding-x-8, padding-y-4. Bar is always visible above hero section.

Full-width section, bg-gradient (blue/white). Centered column flexbox, py-24. Doctor's name in bold 5xl, specialty below in medium 2xl, short tagline below (1.1x tracking, semi-bold). Subtle dental-themed svg illustration (light opacity, layered top right). Box-shadow, border-radius-2xl. Simple fade-up on load.

Contained glass panel (blur-20px, rounded-2xl), margin-y-8, px-8, py-8. 2-col layout: left is headshot (rounded-full, drop-shadow, 180px), right is brief bio (regular Inter, max-w-lg, 1.3 line-height), list of qualifications (small checkmark icons, vertical). Heading in bold 2xl above.

Grid (3-col md, 1-col sm), gap-8, py-10. Each service: glass card with tooth icon, service name (bold), 1-line desc (sm), subtle shadow, hover scale-105. Padding-6, rounded-2xl, indigo highlight on card border.

Horizontal scrollable (snap-x) row (max-3 at desktop, 1 on mobile). Each card: rounded-2xl, soft blue bg, quote icon, patient quote (italic), patient first name, sm profile pic (circle, left), light drop-shadow. Medium px-16 py-8. Heading above (left-aligned, bold).

Side-by-side before/after images in 2-col layout (card: white bg, rounded-2xl, shadow, border border-blue-100, max-width). Label 'Before'/'After' in small caps, tight px, below images. Fade-in on scroll. Section header centered, font-semibold 2xl.

Hidden by default. Opens as centered modal (glassmorphism panel, z-50, blur-20px, rounded-2xl). Small form: name, email, phone, date (all input: rounded-xl, px-4, py-3, bg-slate-50), notes (textarea). Submit: pill-shaped button with blue glow hover. Close icon top-right. Lock scroll when open. Confirmation replaces form on submit. Triggered by 'Book Appointment' button in hero and footer.

Single glass panel, 1-col flex. Contact info rows: phone (call icon), email (mail icon), address (pin icon). Open hours below (sm caps), compact map placeholder (grayscale border-2 ring-1). Padding-6, rounded-2xl, gap-4, bg-opacity-80. Heading above (bold 2xl).

Full-width, bg-blue-800, white text, min-h-24, flex-row center-align. Left: text logo, right: nav links w/ underline on hover. Center: 'Book Appointment' button (pill style, white bg, blue text, shadow). Small copyright and tagline below. Spacing-x-8, py-4.
